page_content: ENSE799 Systems Engineering Thesis (1-6 Credits) The application of systems engineering concepts, principles, and theories will be applied to the Master's Thesis project. Project/thesis work will be deﬁned and selected early in student's program and supervised by a university faculty mentor. Prerequisite: Permission of ENGR-Institute for Systems Research; and ENSE621; and must have 6 additional credits totaling 9 credit hours. Repeatable to: 6 credits.
